title: Japanese Romani Script of the Anime
display_title: Japanese Romani Script of the Anime
wikitext:
[]: Japanese Romani Script of the Anime             Quote Post by Sventevith » Sun Aug 28, 2005 3:43 pm There've been many situations where I want to quote something they say in Japanese, but as my knowledge of Japanese is equal zero, that's not so easy, and a script would help a lot, so I can look it up. ;) Got any link? Or a document? Anything? I'd really appreciate it.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sun Aug 28, 2005 4:45 pm I have all the renewal scripts, but they are images (screencaps from the renewal dvd's). So either you rewerite all the kanji or you put an image. Them scripts here .

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Mon Aug 29, 2005 1:43 am i'm actually working on converting those screenplay pictures to text and rohmaji (arranging them in a spreadsheet).

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Aug 29, 2005 3:26 am A dream come true would be to have them on text, although not so much of a nice dream if they're in romaji. I find it impossible to understand. Just think about it, if you have them kanjis in text form, then it makes all the job of translating easier, as it's just copy and paste on a dictionary like Jim Breens. Considering how many Japanese words share a same pronunciation, a romaji only script would be very hard to understand, methinks.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Aug 29, 2005 8:10 am toiletduck wrote: i'm actually working on converting those screenplay pictures to text and rohmaji (arranging them in a spreadsheet).

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Thu Sep 01, 2005 12:45 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: toiletduck wrote: i'm actually working on converting those screenplay pictures to text and rohmaji (arranging them in a spreadsheet).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 02, 2005 6:01 pm toiletduck wrote: sadly, typing them up. unless someone has a l33t ocr program that can do Japanese...

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Fri Sep 02, 2005 11:22 pm Reichu wrote: toiletduck wrote: sadly, typing them up. unless someone has a l33t ocr program that can do Japanese...

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Sep 02, 2005 11:45 pm Does anybody have some of the renewal scripts (Japanese) on text form?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 03, 2005 1:33 am toiletduck wrote: yeah, i'm using the microsoft Japanese text i.m.e.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sat Sep 03, 2005 2:18 am Could you post them scripts in Japanese, word format, please oh please?

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Sun Sep 04, 2005 11:11 pm i didn't start with the first episodes, thank god. :) once again, i prefer excel as it keeps the grid format of the screeplays and allows for organizing raw Japanese, romaji and translations side-by-side. i'd be glad to do romaji for the #1-4 scripts, by the way. also, does anybody know of a decent free file server or something?
